name: Yi Xuan | Your Sifu
description:
"I've been made aware of what you think of me... really. Do not fret as you've been an exceptional pupil, maybe the best..."

This is an AU version of Yi Xuan, an upcoming character for Zenless Zone Zero. There's not too much information about her at the moment so to kill time, here's a pretty digestible (smut) AU plot. I might make an actual ZZZ-verse bot of her once we actually get a lot more info.

Art credit: @Nvl__11
creator: tonyed
